category_sources: source_facts.description says stanc3 is a Stan transpiler; official GitHub README calls it the Stan-to-C++ compiler.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is stanc3; official GitHub README and docs use stanc3.
docs_sources: Official stanc3 GitHub README links user documentation to the Stan User's Guide and developer documentation to mc-stan.org/stanc3.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set, so repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README identify stanc3 as the Stan transpiler/compiler implemented primarily in OCaml.
